avatarStructure.description: Complete Avatar component structure from Figma
hierarchy: ├─ Ring (absolute, CENTERED using left: 50%, top: 50%, transform: translate(-50%, -50%), conditional, size from sizes[size].ring)
├─ image container (absolute, inset-0, size from sizes[size].image, with border)
└─ Status Badge (absolute, variable size: 8px/10px/12px/16px/18px/20px based on avatar size, positioned by size/shape with variable offset)

figmaCode.structure: Ring element is an SVG image wrapper
figmaCode.positioning: absolute, left: 50%, top: 50%, transform: translate(-50%, -50%) (CENTERED - verified from Figma)
figmaCode.type: SVG image ( tag with SVG asset)
figmaCode.note: Ring is CENTERED - verified from Figma code generation for all 8 sizes

ring.notes: Ring is CENTERED using transform method (left: 50%, top: 50%, transform: translate(-50%, -50%)). Size is 4px larger than image, which results in exactly 2px extension on every side (left, top, right, bottom) when centered. Ring appears to be a white background element that wraps around the avatar. VERIFIED from Figma for all 8 sizes.

fromImageFrame.classes: border border-[#27272a] border-solid overflow-clip rounded-[9999px] size-full
fromImageFrame.note: This shows solid border #27272a, but Avatar component uses token-based border

fromInitials.classes: absolute bg-[var(--bg/basic/red-accent,#e74341)] border border-[var(--border/default,rgba(39,39,42,0.1))] border-solid inset-0 overflow-clip rounded-[var(--full,9999px)]
fromInitials.contains: Initials text directly, NO Image element wrapper

fromEmpty.classes: absolute border border-[var(--border/default,rgba(39,39,42,0.1))] border-solid inset-0 overflow-clip rounded-[var(--sm,6px)]

imageContainer.structure: absolute, inset-0, with border, rounded based on shape
imageContainer.importantNote: Avatar component uses token-based border rgba(39,39,42,0.1), NOT solid #27272a. The solid border appears only in standalone image frame.

content.positioning: absolute flex flex-col justify-center leading-[0] left-[calc(0%-1px)] right-[-1px] text-center top-1/2 translate-y-[-50%]
content.styles: font: var(--body), color: var(--text/white-default,white), size: var(--size/md,16px)

initials.note: No Image element wrapper - just text directly in image container

content.contains: img tag with placeholder user icon
content.positioning: absolute aspect-[48/48] left-[-1px] right-[-1px] top-1/2 translate-y-[-50%]

empty.note: Has Image element wrapper with aspect-ratio, contains placeholder icon

userpic.note: Should be similar to Empty variant but with user's actual image

logo.note: Logo image is passed as prop or child

layers: └─ Moon icon (inset-[8.33%], with nested inset-[8.41%_8.41%_8.33%_8.33%], gray #6f6f77 SVG)
icon.note: Icon can be passed as prop, defaults to moon icon

ringAndDot.structure: Ring at 12.5% inset, Dot at 20.83% inset

outerAndInner.structure: Outer shape at inset-0, Inner content at 8.33% inset

badgePositions.note: Position values stored in statusBadgePositions object in CSS file

sizes.pattern: Ring is always 4px larger than image (2px offset on each side)

initials.note: Users should be able to choose any color token from palette

importantNotes: Ring is conditional (may not always be visible in all variants)
Ring is CENTERED using left: 50%, top: 50%, transform: translate(-50%, -50%) - VERIFIED from Figma for all 8 sizes
Empty variant HAS Image element (not empty - shows placeholder icon)
Initials variant does NOT have Image element wrapper - just text
Status Badge size VARIES by avatar size: 8px/10px/12px/16px/18px/20px - VERIFIED from Figma for all 8 sizes
Status Badge position varies by both size AND shape, with variable offsets: 2xs: -2px, xs: -3px, sm: -3px, md: -2px, lg: -2px, xl: -2px, 2xl: -1px, 3xl: 0px
